title: shuteria ferruginea
intro: Shuteria ferruginea, also known as the Hoary Christ's Gold or Iron-plated Christ's Gold, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Shuteria ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit potential antiviral and anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
